# isQueryNotification

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether this push notification is a query notification.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute Boolean isQueryNotification;
```

## Discussion

`true` if this notification is a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.QueryNotification] object; otherwise, `false`.

## Getting the Notification Type

- **notificationType**: The type of notification.
- **isRecordZoneNotification**: A Boolean value indicating whether this notification is a push notification that was sent because of changes to a record zone.
